high_risk_categories.title: Biometrics
high_risk_categories.description: Remote biometric identification systems, biometrics-based categorization, and emotion recognition systems.

high_risk_categories.title: Critical Infrastructure
high_risk_categories.description: AI systems intended to be used as safety components in the management and operation of road traffic and the supply of water, gas, heating and electricity.

high_risk_categories.title: Education and Vocational Training
high_risk_categories.description: AI systems intended to be used to determine access or admission, or to assess learning outcomes and behavior of students.

high_risk_categories.title: Employment, Workers Management and Access to Self-Employment
high_risk_categories.description: AI systems intended to be used for recruitment, selection, promotion, termination, or monitoring of workers.

high_risk_categories.title: Access to Essential Services and Benefits
high_risk_categories.description: AI systems used to evaluate eligibility for public assistance, credit scoring, or emergency response dispatch.
